usage: get_glitch_threshold [-help] [-cells <string>] [-failure_point {none input internal last}] [-glitch_type {both vl vh vlu vho vl_vh vlu_vho}] [-library_pins <string>] [-nets <string>] [-pin_type {all clock data latch}] [-pins <string>] [-threshold_type {reporting failure}] [-views <string>]

options.name: -cells
options.description: specify list of library cell names

options.name: -failure_point
options.description: {none input internal last} Specifies where the glitch criteria applies, default: applies for both- internal and last

options.name: -glitch_type
options.description: {both vl vh vlu vho vl_vh vlu_vho} Specifies the glitch type for threshold application. default=both

options.name: -library_pins
options.description: specify list of library pin names

options.name: -pin_type
options.description: Specifies the pin type for threshold application. default=all

options.name: -pins
options.description: specify list of instance pin names
